title: Gooey Yoghurt Mediterranean Stir-fry
description: A quick-fix tangy and gooey mediterranean dish featuring light rum that's perfect for a low-fat-friendly dinner.

ingredients.name: Light rum
ingredients.notes: Optional, for added flavor and depth of flavor

instructions: In a large skillet or wok, heat the olive oil over medium-high heat.
Add minced garlic and cook for about 30 seconds until fragrant but not browned.
Toss in the finely chopped onion and red pepper flakes. Cook for another minute.
Stir in diced zucchini and sliced tomatoes. Cover and let it simmer for 5 minutes or until vegetables are tender.
Fold in Greek yogurt, adding light rum if using, and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes.
Taste and adjust seasoning as needed. Stir in finely chopped parsley just before serving.
